name: netlify-share-plugin
description: WebStorm plugin — right-click any HTML file to share on Netlify

scripts.install: brew install openjdk@21 gradle || true && gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.8
scripts.release: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && sed -i '' "s/version = \"[^\"]*\"/version = \"$VERSION\"/" build.gradle.kts && npm run build && gh release create v$VERSION build/distributions/*.zip --title "Netlify Share v$VERSION" --generate-notes
